title: blechnum auriculatum
intro: Blechnum auriculatum, also known as the ear-leaved chain fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Blechnaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Blechnum auriculatum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, powder, and tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
